_comment: MCP server config for Claude Code. Most servers are commented out; enable as needed. Built-in tools (file edit, bash, web search) cover most workflows — only add MCP servers when they provide real value.

_github_example._comment: Uncomment and configure when you set up GitHub for the project. Useful for PR review, issue management.

_sqlite_journal_example._comment: Uncomment after Phase 1 produces a journal database. Lets Claude Code query the trade journal in natural language during reviews.
